task_completion.description: Verify that nodes for all 18 activities (A through R) are present in the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The diagram contains 18 distinct nodes, each labeled with an Activity ID from A to R.

task_completion.description: Verify that the nodes display the required 7 pieces of information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Each node is structured to show Activity ID, Duration, Early Start (ES), Early Finish (EF), Late Start (LS), Late Finish (LF), and Slack/Float. This is typically formatted as a grid or list within the node.

task_completion.description: Verify that activities are connected with arrows representing predecessor relationships.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Arrows connect the nodes in a logical left-to-right flow, showing dependencies between the activities.

task_completion.description: Verify the Forward and Backward Pass calculations are correct by checking the final project duration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final node(s) in the network (specifically Node R) should display an Early Finish (EF) and Late Finish (LF) of exactly 61.

task_completion.description: Verify the critical path is correctly identified and highlighted in RED.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Nodes A, B, C, D, E, F, G, L, M, N, O, P, Q, and R, along with the arrows connecting them, are colored RED. These nodes should all display a Slack/Float of 0.

task_completion.description: Verify non-critical activities are NOT highlighted and show positive slack.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Nodes H, I, J, and K are NOT colored red and display a Slack/Float value greater than 0.

task_completion.description: Verify the diagram is saved as a .drawio file and exported as a .pdf in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer, terminal, or save dialogs show 'construction_pert.drawio' and 'construction_pert.pdf' located in the '~/Diagrams' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a diagramming application (like Draw.io) to create the network.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Draw.io (or similar) graphical user interface with the diagram being actively edited, rather than a script generating the diagram invisibly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent opened and read the source CSV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent viewing 'construction_wbs.csv' in a spreadsheet application, text editor, or terminal to extract the activity data.

integrity.description: Verify the PDF was exported using the application's export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the 'File -> Export as -> PDF' menu in the diagramming tool, rather than using a command-line conversion tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project consists of 18 activities (A through R). The correct project duration is 61 days (Node R should have EF/LF of 61). The critical path consists of activities A, B, C, D, E, F, G, L, M, N, O, P, Q, and R; these must have 0 slack and be highlighted in RED. Activities H, I, J, and K are non-critical (slack > 0) and must NOT be red. The final files must be saved as ~/Diagrams/construction_pert.drawio and ~/Diagrams/construction_pert.pdf.
